launch_inputs.request_summary: Support needs an escalation packet for a recurring audit export failure that likely spans product, infrastructure, and customer-communication concerns.
launch_inputs.customer_context: The same customer has escalated twice this week and leadership wants a sharper route, owner, and open-questions list.
launch_inputs.known_artifacts: Use the uploaded customer thread as the seed evidence and build a deeper escalation packet rather than a customer-ready reply.
